description: Create a new security configuration in GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/) using credentials 'admin' and 'Admin123!'. Create a role named 'ROLE_DATA_ANALYST' and an enabled user named 'analyst_jones' with password 'Analyst2024!'. Assign the 'ROLE_DATA_ANALYST' role to 'analyst_jones'. Verify the new user's authentication against the GeoServer REST API and save the resulting HTTP status code to /home/ga/auth_test_result.txt.
